goal: 批次D：修复 Issue #2 (P-01 模型列表三重定义，从 constants.ts 统一导出)

coverage_checklist.constants_has_text_models: assert: constants.ts 导出 TEXT_MODELS（与 Welcome/Settings 格式一致）
coverage_checklist.welcome_imports_from_constants: assert: Welcome.tsx 从 @shared/constants 导入 VISION_MODELS/TEXT_PROVIDERS/TEXT_MODELS
coverage_checklist.settings_imports_from_constants: assert: Settings.tsx 从 @shared/constants 导入 VISION_MODELS/TEXT_PROVIDERS/TEXT_MODELS
